summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. No GitHub mutations planned; merge, fix, raise_pr, instant close, low-signal close, and post-merge close are disabled by job/frontmatter. Hydrated preflight showed no security-sensitive items. The shard has no shared canonical, so hydrated PRs are kept as independent backlog items unless the artifact lacks live state or the PR itself requires maintainer/product judgment.

actions.reason: Independent high-risk gateway authorization fix requiring normal maintainer review; no closure or merge action is allowed in this shard.
